task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Service Quality Gap Analysis - SERVQUAL 2024' in the LimeSurvey admin interface (e.g., in the survey list or survey settings header).

task_completion.description: Verify the two required question groups are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure or group list to confirm the presence of two groups: 'Service Quality Dimensions' and 'Overall Assessment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the SQ001 question is created as a mandatory Array (Dual Scale) type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with code 'SQ001' in the 'Service Quality Dimensions' group. Its question type should be 'Array (Dual Scale)' and the 'Mandatory' setting must be enabled (often indicated by a red asterisk or a toggle set to 'On').

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 SERVQUAL dimensions are added as subquestions to SQ001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the subquestions configuration page for SQ001. There should be exactly 5 subquestions listed: 'Tangibles', 'Reliability', 'Responsiveness', 'Assurance', and 'Empathy'.

task_completion.description: Verify the two answer scales are configured for SQ001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the answer options page for SQ001. Scale 1 should have options ranging from 1 (Not at all Important) to 5 (Extremely Important). Scale 2 should have options ranging from 1 (Very Poor) to 5 (Excellent).

task_completion.description: Verify the FEEDBACK question is created as a Long Free Text type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with code 'FEEDBACK' in the 'Overall Assessment' group. Its question type should be 'Long free text'.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey is set to anonymized responses and is activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey status showing as 'Active' (often a green play button or active status badge). Also, look in the Participant settings or survey summary to confirm 'Anonymized responses' is set to 'Yes' or 'On'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web GUI to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the LimeSurvey admin web interface in a browser, not a terminal window executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the browser is navigating the actual LimeSurvey application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show standard LimeSurvey admin URLs (e.g., /index.php/admin/...), not local file paths or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open modifying the DOM to falsely display the survey title or question types.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey title must contain the keyword 'SERVQUAL'. The Array Dual Scale question (Code: SQ001) must have exactly 5 subquestions matching the SERVQUAL dimensions: Tangibles, Reliability, Responsiveness, Assurance, and Empathy. It must have exactly 2 answer scales configured (Scale 1 for Importance, Scale 2 for Performance).
